name: Procore Technologies, Inc.
description: Procore Technologies, Inc. is a leading global provider of cloud-based construction management software. Founded in 2002 and headquartered in Carpinteria, California, the company offers a purpose-built, unified platform that connects all stakeholders on a construction project, from the field to the office. With over two decades of experience, Procore’s technology enables real-time visibility, improved collaboration, and data-driven decision-making across millions of projects worldwide. By integrating machine learning, predictive analytics, and AI-driven automation, Procore aims to make the construction industry safer, more efficient, and more sustainable for everyone involved in the building process.
